x-enumeration-literals.name: Margin
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account is used when financing is done by the broker. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Short Sale
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account is used for short sale orders. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Abroad
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account is located in a financial institution outside the country where the transaction is taking place. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Centralised
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account and all its related positions are held in one location. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cash DVP
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account is used for settlement upon delivery, or a collection on a delivery basis. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Physical
x-enumeration-literals.description: Account is used for physical domestic safekeeping. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fungible
x-enumeration-literals.description: Financial instruments in the safekeeping account are fungible. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Non Fungible
x-enumeration-literals.description: Financial instruments in the safekeeping account are not fungible. (ISO20022)
